title: Partial index and BETWEEN issue
poc: CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(1) WHERE c0 NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE '' BETWEEN t0.c0 AND 1 IN (FALSE);
SELECT '' BETWEEN t0.c0 AND 1 IN (FALSE) FROM t0;
key_bug_features: INDEX causes query malfunction with BETWEEN expression
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 TEXT, c2 INTEGER, c3 REAL);
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t1(c2) WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, 5, 3.14);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE '' BETWEEN c1 AND c2 IN (TRUE);
SELECT '' BETWEEN c1 AND c2 IN (TRUE) FROM t1;
